name: Easy Chicken Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts, skinless, boneless, 4 oz each
2 cups Basic Bread Crumbs (see separate recipe)
Olive Oil flavored Pam cooking spray
2 oz Healthy Choice Fat Free mozzarella cheese - grated
2 oz Truly Lite Fat Free ricotta cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip each chicken breast in Egg Beaters, then coat with bread crumbs.
2. Spray a large skillet with Pam cooking spray and heat.
3. Quickly brown the chicken breasts on both sides, about 3-5 minutes total.
4. Coat a baking dish with Pam cooking spray.
5. Place the chicken in the pan; top each breast with 1/3 cup of spaghetti sauce.
6. Combine equal amounts of mozzarella and ricotta cheeses.
7. Place an equal amount of cheese mixture on each chicken breast.
8. Cover and bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
9. Remove chicken from the oven.
10. Sprinkle remaining bread crumbs over the chicken.
11. Bake uncovered for 5-10 more minutes, or until browned.
Per Serving: 4g fat, 256 calories, 14% fat, 28.8g protein, 10.6g carbs, 805mg sodium, 65 cholesterol.
